case_title: CLEANERIFIC LLC VS. EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC.
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -BRUNO MATOS TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF CLEANERIFIC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-29-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BRUNO MARTOS (PRESIDENT AND CEO). DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BRUNO MATOS (PRESIDENT AND CEO). DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,675.00 FILED BY CLEANERIFIC LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC. $4,675.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-30-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BRUNO MATOS (PRESIDENT AND CEO). DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE PRIOR TO TODAY'S COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF INFORMS CLAIM HAS BEEN SERVED BY A PROCESS SERVER. PROOF OF SERVICE HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO FILED AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE AND TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AT LEAST 5 DAYS PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT DATE. CONTINUED DATE AS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT: CT CORP] (**SEE SIGNATURE SECTION** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED FEB-10-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $190. SERVED JUN-01-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE/SEE RECD BY SIGNNATURE LINE* SERVED DEC-05-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-31-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BRUNO MARTOS (PRESIDENT AND CEO). DEFENDANT EXCEL HOTEL SERVICES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
